REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1101 Fitzgerald Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for and with (successor trustee) Paula Bibbs.

The sale for improved real property was confirmed at $630,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 11/1/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $599,000.00 is required.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Ideta. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal.
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal Of Successor Co-Trustee Peter James Mitchell, For Appointment Of Paula R. Bibbs As Sole Successor Trustee And For Court Supervisi
Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: G. Franchesca Callejo for petitioner Paula Bibbs; Tricia Friedeberg for Patricia Lowe.

The Court stated that he was now prepared to accept the resignation of Mr. Mitchell as co-trustee and to approve the appointment of Paula Bibbs as successor trustee. Ms. Callejo stated that the Court would need to appoint a probate referee. The Court responded that Lawrence Lee would be appointed as probate referee. The Court granted the petition (order signed). The Court further ordered: Status Hearing for filing Inventory and Appraisal is set for November 16, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. First Account and Status Report is to be filed one week before: October 18, 2017.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)

Petition For Removal Of Successor Co-Trustee Peter James Mitchell, For Appointment Of Paula R. Bibbs As Sole Successor Trustee And For Court Supervisi
Off Calendar Aug-04-2016 Continued To Aug-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Successor Co-Trustee Peter James Mitchell, For Appointment Of Paula R. Bibbs As Sole Successor Trustee And For Court Supervisi
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Continued To Aug-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Casey Cummins for Peter Mitchell; Bruce Feder for Patricia Lowe.

Mr. Cummins stated that his client Peter Mitchell is now reluctantly willing to step down as
co-Trustee in favor of a professional fiduciary, but only on the provision that the fiduciary is not Paula Bibbs. He had proposed the name of a different professional fiduciary to Mr. Feder. Mr. Feder responded that his client wanted to proceed with the petition for appointment of Ms. Bibbs, who had been appointed to serve as conservator of Charles Mitchell and is already familiar with the situation. He objected to designating a different person for appointment as trustee at this time, as that would entail amending the petition and giving new notice, causing undue delay. Mr. Cummins replied that there is a history of conflict between Mr. Mitchell and Ms. Bibbs, where Ms. Bibbs had acted towards his client in an insulting and unprofessional manner on different occasions. He stated that if the Court was unwilling to select a different person to be appointed as trustee, his client wanted a hearing on the matter. The Court stated that a separate hearing would be held on the removal of the co-trustees, but that he would proceed with the order to suspend the co-trustees and to appoint Paula Bibbs as successor trustee, with that appointment not to take into effect until July 6, 2016. In the interim, he urged the parties to try to reach agreement on a viable alternate professional fiduciary. The Court set an evidentiary hearing on the petition for removal of the co-trustees for August 5, 2016 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Mr. Feder agreed to prepare an appropriate order for submission to the Court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy John Boncato. (Not reported)
